title: AvaritiaNeo
description: ‚ÄãThis project is an unofficial remaster mod for Avaritia.‚Äã
body:
## Information:
1. This is an unofficial remaster of the Avaritia mod for modern Minecraft versions.
2. You can use ‚Äã‚ÄãJEI‚Äã‚Äã or EMI or ‚Äã‚ÄãREI‚Äã‚Äã to view all of the recipes.

## Features:
- Crafting in 9x9 Extreme Crafting Table.
- Compression singularity in Neutronium Compressor.
- Neutron Pile is collected in Neutron Collector.
- Store unlimited items in Infinity Chest.
- Powerful weapons,tools and armor.
- Use JEI or EMI or REI to view recipes.
